summary: Completed testing for Task 4 (Business Registration - Fase 1). All 4 steps of the multi-step registration form work correctly. Backend API validates and creates businesses with PENDING status.

issues: Toast notification for INE validation appears at top of page - works but could be more prominent near the upload zone

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register - Creates business with status='pending' ✓
Backend: Registration returns token and business data ✓
Backend: Missing required fields returns 422 validation error ✓
Backend: Invalid email format returns 422 validation error ✓
Backend: Deposit settings saved correctly (minimum 50 MXN enforced) ✓
Backend: Pending business visible with include_pending=true, can_accept_bookings=false ✓
Frontend: Step 1 - Business info form renders with all fields ✓
Frontend: Step 1 - Category dropdown populated from /api/categories ✓
Frontend: Step 2 - Location form with address/city/state/zip ✓
Frontend: Step 3 - Documents with RFC, legal name, INE upload, proof (optional) ✓
Frontend: Step 3 - INE upload validation blocks progress without file ✓
Frontend: Step 4 - Account with password, confirm, CLABE, deposit option, terms ✓
Frontend: Navigation Next/Previous between steps works ✓
Frontend: Form validation active on all required fields ✓
Frontend: E2E test - Full registration redirects to /business/dashboard ✓
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'En revisión' status and warning about no bookings ✓

test_credentials.note: Each test creates unique TEST_* prefixed businesses with random emails

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed businesses during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Business registration (Task 4) fully verified. All 4 steps work: (1) Business info with category, (2) Location, (3) Documents with RFC and INE upload, (4) Account with CLABE and terms. Businesses are created with PENDING status and cannot accept bookings until approved. File upload is MOCKED (returns 'uploaded:filename'). Previous iterations verified admin 2FA and audit logs.

mocked_features.file_upload: INE and proof of address uploads are mocked - return 'uploaded:filename' instead of cloud storage URL
mocked_features.sms: SMS for phone verification is mocked (SMS_PROVIDER=mock)

verification_summary.step1_business_data: ✓ Name, email, phone, category, description - all validated
verification_summary.step2_location: ✓ Address, city, state, zip code, country - all validated
verification_summary.step3_documents: ✓ Legal name, RFC (12-13 char format), INE upload required, proof optional
verification_summary.step4_account: ✓ Password (min 8 chars, must match confirm), CLABE (18 digits), deposit optional, terms required
verification_summary.post_registration: ✓ Redirects to dashboard, shows 'En revisión' status
